channel.title: Pip on Xianpeng Shen
channel.description: Recent content in Pip on Xianpeng Shen
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2017–2025 Xianpeng Shen. All rights reserved.

item.title: Python Supply Chain 'Nuclear Bomb' Attack Just Happened—A `pip install` Steals All Your Credentials!
item.author: xianpeng.shen@gmail.com (Xianpeng Shen)
item.description: A Python supply chain attack has occurred, where a single pip install can steal all your credentials. This post introduces how to use pipguard to intercept malicious packages before installation.

item.title: Still using pip and venv? You're outdated! Try uv!
item.author: xianpeng.shen@gmail.com (Xianpeng Shen)
item.description: uv is a Python package management tool developed by the Astral team. It replaces the functionality of pip, venv, and pip-tools, offering faster dependency resolution and a more modern project management approach.
